title: AUDIENCE-ASK — Eva: 'Should we tell Papa?' then yells
prompt: Medium shot of @backyard, sunny afternoon. @Eva already CENTER-LEFT in the grass on her knees, naughty grin, pressing one finger to her lips in a 'shhh' gesture, and turning her head DIRECTLY toward the camera with a scheming sparkle. @Sara already CENTER-RIGHT next to her sister also kneeling in the grass, both girls still pink-cheeked from laughing. Eva (to camera, finger to lips, conspiratorial whisper): "Should we tell Papa?" She holds the look at the camera for two full beats — waiting for the kid watching at home to answer out loud. Then she breaks into a huge mischievous grin and her face goes from whisper to MAXIMUM VOLUME instantly. Eva (suddenly cupping both hands around her mouth, full-volume yell, cheerful but commanding): "PAPA — LOOK!! LOOOOOK!!" Sara claps both hands over her mouth, beaming, eyes huge, trying not to lose it. Sara (giggling, leaning in to Eva): "He's gonna FREAK." Eva (still beaming straight at camera): "Watch this. Watch THIS."
